description.short: Your self-hosted Ghostfolio portfolio, made AI-native — Irisy reads holdings and records trades through the :17873 gate.
description.long: A CTRL feature pack for Ghostfolio (open-source, self-hosted finance). Beyond the raw REST, CTRL lifts the portfolio into the uniform §14 describe/query contract (ghostfolio_describe / ghostfolio_query) and a one-shot produce (ghostfolio_add_transaction) — governed + audited at :17873, with the instance URL + token kept in the credential store and never shown to the model.

fields.label: Ghostfolio instance URL
fields.description: Your self-hosted Ghostfolio base URL, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:3333

fields.label: Security token
fields.description: Ghostfolio API security token (Settings → Security Token). Stored in the OS keychain, never sent to the model.
